content:
CPUT Blackboard Login — Cape Peninsula University of Technology

The Cape Peninsula University of Technology (CPUT) Blackboard portal is the official online learning management system for CPUT students across the Cape Town, Bellville, Granger Bay, and Mowbray campuses. Use this guide to access Blackboard CPUT, solve common login issues, and explore bursary assistance for 2026.

CPUT Blackboard Direct Login

🔗 Go to CPUT Blackboard Login → cput.blackboard.com

You will need:
- Your CPUT student number
- Your CPUT Blackboard password (linked to your CPUT network account)

How to Login to Blackboard CPUT — Step-by-Step

  1. Open Google Chrome or Firefox — Recommended browsers for CPUT Blackboard.
  2. Navigate to cput.blackboard.com — This is the official CPUT Blackboard URL.
  3. Enter your CPUT student number — Use the student number from your CPUT student card.
  4. Enter your network password — This is the same password you use for CPUT campus Wi-Fi and computer labs.
  5. Click Sign In — Your Blackboard CPUT dashboard will load, showing all your current modules.

CPUT Blackboard Login Troubleshooting

Forgotten CPUT Blackboard Password

Your CPUT Blackboard password is the same as your CPUT network password. To reset it:

  • Use the CPUT self-service password reset at accounts.cput.ac.za
  • Or contact CPUT ICT Services: +27 21 959 6767 / itservicedesk@cput.ac.za
  • Or visit the ICT Service Desk at any CPUT campus with your student card

CPUT Student Number Not Working

Confirm that:

  • Your CPUT registration is fully complete (allow 48 hours after registration)
  • You are using your CPUT student number, not your ID number
  • You are accessing the correct URL: cput.blackboard.com

Modules Missing from Blackboard CPUT

CPUT lecturers publish modules before or during the first week of lectures. If a module is not visible after the semester starts, contact your module lecturer or department administrator.

CPUT Blackboard on Different Campuses

The same CPUT Blackboard login works for all campuses — Cape Town (District Six), Bellville, Granger Bay, Mowbray, and Wellington. Your student number is your universal login credential.

CPUT Blackboard on Mobile

Download the Blackboard Student app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store to access CPUT Blackboard from your smartphone or tablet. Log in using your CPUT student number and network password.

2026 Bursary Assistance for CPUT Students

Cape Peninsula University of Technology has one of the largest and most diverse student bodies in the Western Cape. Many CPUT students depend on bursaries to complete their qualifications in engineering, business, health, applied sciences, and design.

StudyBuddy provides bursary assistance tailored to CPUT students:

  • 📋 NSFAS at CPUT — Apply, appeal, or resolve funding disputes with NSFAS for your CPUT studies
  • 🌊 Western Cape provincial bursaries — Government funding for Western Cape students in education, nursing, and social services
  • ⚙️ Engineering & Technology bursaries — CPUT is a top engineering university; Eskom, Aurecon, Transnet, and others fund CPUT engineering students
  • 🎨 Design & Creative Industries funding — Sector-specific bursaries for CPUT's Design Faculty
  • ⏰ Apply before 2026 deadlines — Most bursaries close between March and July 2026

👉 Find 2026 bursaries for CPUT students →

👉 Get 24/7 AI academic support from StudyBuddy →

⚠️ Disclaimer: StudyBuddy is an independent student support platform. We are not officially affiliated with the Cape Peninsula University of Technology (CPUT) or Blackboard Inc. All CPUT trademarks belong to their respective owners. Your data is protected under POPIA and is only used to facilitate bursary assistance.

faqs.question: What is the CPUT Blackboard login URL?
faqs.answer: The CPUT Blackboard login URL is cput.blackboard.com. Open this in Google Chrome or Firefox, enter your CPUT student number and network password, and click Sign In.

faqs.question: What password do I use for CPUT Blackboard?
faqs.answer: Your CPUT Blackboard password is the same as your CPUT network account password — used for campus Wi-Fi and computer labs. To reset it, visit accounts.cput.ac.za or contact CPUT ICT Services at +27 21 959 6767.

faqs.question: Does the same CPUT Blackboard login work for all campuses?
faqs.answer: Yes. The same CPUT Blackboard login at cput.blackboard.com works for all CPUT campuses including Cape Town (District Six), Bellville, Granger Bay, Mowbray, and Wellington.

faqs.question: What bursaries are available for CPUT students in 2026?
faqs.answer: CPUT students can apply for NSFAS, Western Cape provincial bursaries, and corporate bursaries in engineering, technology, health sciences, and design. StudyBuddy helps CPUT students identify and apply for the right funding before 2026 deadlines.

faqs.question: How do I contact CPUT ICT for Blackboard support?
faqs.answer: Contact CPUT ICT Services at +27 21 959 6767 or itservicedesk@cput.ac.za. You can also visit the ICT Service Desk at any CPUT campus with your student card.
